prompt:
A single 5-gallon (19 L) high-density polyethylene bucket with a sturdy metal handle, shown as a clean standalone utility container. Emphasize the thick rim, slight scuffs from use, and the curved metal handle with side lugs; the bucket should look capable of carrying liquids without any branding or readable markings. Place it on a simple workshop floor or bench with soft shadows to keep the object clearly legible.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a minimal near-future solarpunk workshop aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic plastic texture, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the composition centered and uncluttered so the bucket reads instantly as an inventory icon.
